steps.title: Find the requested title
steps.content: The student wants the title of Singer's first published short story. The notes identify the first published fiction as a short story and state that it was called 'Gimpel the Fool.'

steps.title: Choose the title statement
steps.content: A identifies the genre but omits the title. C gives the publication venue and year but not the title. D gives only the year. The needed sentence names 'Gimpel the Fool' as the first published short story. The answer is B.
